url.description: The fully qualified URL (including host and scheme) where this site is hosted. All URLs generated for this site will be appended to this.

channel_id.description: The channel to which this site is attached. Each site belongs to a single channel, and each channel can have either zero or more sites.

created_at.description: The date-time that this site was created, formatted as an [RFC-3339](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt) string.

updated_at.description: The date-time that this site was last updated, formatted as an [RFC-3339](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt) string.

ssl_status.description: Indicates if a private/dedicated SSL is installed on this site, or if itʼs using shared SSL.

urls.description: All URLs that belong to the site, including `primary`, `canonical`, and `checkout` URLs.

is_checkout_url_customized.description: Indicates whether the channel uses a custom checkout domain. When `false`, the checkout domain falls back to the default channel’s primary URL.
